interface.longDescription:
Book like an insider. Find and book your next great hotel deal with Vio.com in ChatGPT.
Search for accommodation exactly the way you need it and instantly explore matching hotels on an interactive map, with live prices and real-time availability. Ask follow-up questions, compare options, and open hotel cards to see all the details. When you’re ready, click View deal to complete your booking on the final site.
defaultPrompt: Show hotels in Barcelona, 16-18 November for two
